net.label: Network access
net.description: Make outbound HTTP requests to allow-listed hosts

secrets.label: Secret storage
secrets.description: Read and write per-plugin credentials in the OS keychain

fs.label: Filesystem access
fs.description: Read and write files under allow-listed paths

exec.label: Run programs
exec.description: Spawn child processes from an allow-listed list of binaries

location.label: Location
location.description: Access the hub's physical location (address, coordinates, timezone)

sparks.label: Sparks
sparks.description: Emit and subscribe to events on the spark bus

blocks.label: Blocks
blocks.description: Register reactive blocks and emit block updates

bricks.label: Bricks
bricks.description: Register dashboard widgets and push data to them

routes.label: HTTP routes
routes.description: Register HTTP route handlers under the plugin's namespace

actions.label: Actions
actions.description: Register actions that other plugins or the user can trigger

prefs.label: Preferences
prefs.description: Write the plugin's own preference values
